name: Leveraging Knowledge Profiles and Generative AI for Realistic Student Response Generation
venue: Artificial Intelligence in Education. Posters and Late Breaking Results, Workshops and Tutorials, Industry and Innovation Tracks, Practitioners, Doctoral Consortium, Blue Sky, and WideAIED
summary: AIED 2025 paper proposing rubric-aligned synthetic student response generation with LLMs guided by knowledge profiles and representative examples.
